memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: BinaryCloudSave

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: BinaryCloudSave

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FString const &FileType, bool bIsPublic, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SaveUserBinaryRecord

briefdescription.para: Save a namespace-level user binary. If the binary doesn't exist, it will create the binary save, if already exists, it will append to the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
File type of the binary (supported file types are jpeg, jpg, png, bmp, gif, mp3, webp, and bin).
Whether to save the binary as a public or private record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, EAccelByteFileType FileType, bool bIsPublic, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SaveUserBinaryRecord

briefdescription.para: Save a namespace-level user binary. If the binary doesn't exist, it will create the binary save, if already exists, it will append to the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
File type of the binary (supported file types are jpeg, jpg, png, bmp, gif, mp3, webp, and bin).
Whether to save the binary as a public or private record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserBinaryRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetCurrentUserBinaryRecord

briefdescription.para: Get current user's binary record by its key in namespace-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserBinaryRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserBinaryRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetPublicUserBinaryRecord

briefdescription.para: Get a user's public binary record by its key and the owner's UserId in namespace-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
UserId of the binary record owner.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserBinaryRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< FString > &Keys, THandler< FAccelByteModelsListUserBinaryRecords > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkGetCurrentUserBinaryRecords

briefdescription.para: Bulk get current user's binary records by their keys.

parameterdescription.para: List of keys of the binary records.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsListUserBinaryRecords&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< FString > &Keys, FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsListUserBinaryRecords > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkGetPublicUserBinaryRecords

briefdescription.para: Bulk get multiple public binary records from a single user by their keys.

parameterdescription.para: List of key(s) of the binary record.
UserId of the binary record owner.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsListUserBinaryRecords&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, const TArray< FString > &UserIds, THandler< FAccelByteModelsListUserBinaryRecords > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkGetPublicUserBinaryRecords

briefdescription.para: Bulk get public binary records with the same key from multiple users.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
UserId list of the binary record owner(s).
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsListUserBinaryRecords&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Query, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserBinaryRecords > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20)
memberdef.name: BulkQueryCurrentUserBinaryRecords

briefdescription.para: Bulk query current user's binary records.

parameterdescription.para: String that will be used to query the user's keys.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserBinaryRecords&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserBinaryRecords > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20)
memberdef.name: BulkQueryPublicUserBinaryRecords

briefdescription.para: Bulk query all of a user's public binary records.

parameterdescription.para: UserId of the binary record owner.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserBinaryRecords&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FString const &FileType, FString const &FileLocation, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserBinaryRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateUserBinaryRecordFile

briefdescription.para: Update current user's binary record to point to an uploaded file.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
File type of the uploaded binary (supported file types are jpeg, jpg, png, bmp, gif, mp3, webp, and bin).
Location of the uploaded binary file.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserBinaryRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, EAccelByteFileType ContentType, FString const &FileLocation, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserBinaryRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateUserBinaryRecordFile

briefdescription.para: Update current user's binary record to point to an uploaded file.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
The specific type of the binary record created.
Location of the uploaded binary file.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserBinaryRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, bool bIsPublic, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserBinaryRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateUserBinaryRecordMetadata

briefdescription.para: Update current user's binary record's metadata in namespace-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
Whether to update the binary into a public or private record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserBinaryRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteUserBinaryRecord

briefdescription.para: Delete current user's binary record under the given key in namespace-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FString const &FileType, THandler< FAccelByteModelsBinaryInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RequestUserBinaryRecordPresignedUrl

briefdescription.para: Request a presigned url to upload current user's binary record file.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
File type of the binary (supported file types are jpeg, jpg, png, bmp, gif, mp3, webp, and bin).
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, EAccelByteFileType FileType, THandler< FAccelByteModelsBinaryInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RequestUserBinaryRecordPresignedUrl

briefdescription.para: Request a presigned url to upload current user's binary record file.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
File type of the binary (supported file types are jpeg, jpg, png, bmp, gif, mp3, webp, and bin).
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGameBinaryRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGameBinaryRecord

briefdescription.para: Get a game binary record by its key.

parameterdescription.para: Key of the binary record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsGameBinaryRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &Keys, THandler< FAccelByteModelsListGameBinaryRecords > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkGetGameBinaryRecords

briefdescription.para: Bulk get game binary records by their keys.

parameterdescription.para: List of keys of the binary record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsListGameBinaryRecords&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Query, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedGameBinaryRecords > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20)
memberdef.name: BulkQueryGameBinaryRecords

parameterdescription.para: String that will be used to query the game's binary record keys.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedGameBinaryRecords&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.
